subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness, even as God did testify before the creation of the heavens and of the earth, that there is none other God but Him, and He Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و الارض انه لا اله الا هو و الذی
subcodes.subjects: @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
